Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

4.7/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Tulsa Remodel & Restoration to get the job done right.

“Tulsa Remodel & Restoration did an amazing job on our kitchen remodel! They helped us design a beautiful and functional space that we absolutely love. The team was professional, courteous, and always on time. Highly recommend!”

Sarah M. Kitchen Remodeling
Nov 15, 2024

“We hired Tulsa Remodel & Restoration to remodel our master bathroom, and we're very happy with the results. The quality of workmanship is excellent, and they were very responsive to our questions and concerns. There were a couple of minor delays, but they communicated them well.”

David B. Bathroom Remodeling
Oct 28, 2024

“Tulsa Remodel & Restoration transformed our unfinished basement into a fantastic home theater and game room. The process was smooth and efficient, and the team was very knowledgeable and helpful. We're so glad we chose them!”

Emily K. Basement Finishing
Sep 5, 2024

“Our siding was damaged in a recent storm, and Tulsa Remodel & Restoration did an excellent job replacing it. They were quick, efficient, and the new siding looks great. They even helped us navigate the insurance claim process.”

Robert L. Exterior Remodeling
Aug 12, 2024

“We hired Tulsa Remodel & Restoration to paint the interior of our home, and we're very pleased with the results. The painters were professional and meticulous, and they did a great job of protecting our furniture and belongings. The color looks fantastic!”

Jessica P. Painting Services
Jul 20, 2024

“After a pipe burst in our home, Tulsa Remodel & Restoration was there to help. They extracted the water, dried the affected areas, and repaired the damage quickly and efficiently. They were a lifesaver!”

Michael S. Restoration Services
Jun 1, 2024
Tulsa Remodel & Restoration

Trusted remodeling contractor professionals serving Tulsa, OK and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
